nasb.text: You who have escaped the sword, Depart! Do not stay! Remember the Lord from afar, And let Jerusalem come to your mind.

esv.text: “You who have escaped from the sword, go, do not stand still! Remember the Lord from far away, and let Jerusalem come into your mind:

cnv.text: 那些已逃脫了刀劍的人哪！ 走吧！不要站著， 要從遠方記念耶和華， 心中惦念耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: “刀下逃生的人啊， 你们快走吧！ 不要停留！ 在远方要记住耶和华， 要追想耶路撒冷。
